title: Tech & Status Symbols: Copy & Paste 📶 🔋 ⏻ Wi-Fi, Battery & Power
meta_description: Copy and paste tech status symbols — Wi-Fi and signal (📶), battery and power (🔋 ⏻), and sound and notification glyphs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Signal bars, battery, power, and notification glyphs — the status-bar icons of digital life. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The icons that fill a phone or laptop status bar have Unicode equivalents you can drop into text. This library gathers connectivity and signal glyphs, power and battery indicators including the standard IEC power symbol (⏻), and the sound and notification icons used across apps. Click any character to copy it for UI mockups, bios, captions, or status updates.

sections.label: Connectivity
sections.intro: Wireless, signal, and network glyphs for status bars and connection states.

sections.label: Power
sections.intro: Battery, plug, and the IEC standard power-control glyphs.

sections.label: Sound & Alerts
sections.intro: Volume, mute, and notification glyphs for media and alert states.

related.title: Discord Symbols
related.desc: Symbols and glyphs that render cleanly in Discord names and messages.

related.title: Instagram Symbols
related.desc: Symbols and characters that stand out in Instagram bios and captions.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.
